caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a dark grey t-shirt and headphones, appears in a small inset window in the lower-left corner of the scene. He is positioned in a room with a Christmas tree visible behind him to the left and a whiteboard to the right. The main background transitions through several graphic sequences. Initially, it shows distorted colorful bars and shapes, including a bright green glow, with the text "HARVEST PRESENT" at the top left. This shifts to a solid deep purple background before transitioning into a scene dominated by orange autumn leaves. In the final sequence, a stylized red logo featuring the characters "U2" appears over a purple and orange backdrop. At the bottom of the screen, a menu bar becomes visible with options including "MARK/UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK."
